title: 劇的・風水リフォーム！

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Today's outing was great! All that's left to do now
is head back to the academy and get some rest...

text_block_list.name: Old Man
text_block_list.text:
We barely get any customers! How are we
supposed to revitalize this old inn?!

text_block_list.name: Old Lady
text_block_list.text:
You only just took over! Don't throw in the towel
so fast! There's a lot of history here, you know.
You should take good care of this place!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Are you struggling with something? I'd be happy
to lend you an ear!

text_block_list.name: Old Man
text_block_list.text:
...And so, I'm thinking about closing down my
parents' inn. Sure there's a history there, but it's
run-down and nobody comes to stay there
anymore...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
An inn that has to be closed down due to a lack
of customers... that's also a precious building you
inherited from your parents...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Um! Could you show me the inn?!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: I see... So this is the entrance...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: I knew it! It's filthy!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
But the entrance is where you invite the god of
fortune in! You can't extend an invitation when
it's in this state!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
But the direction's not bad, y'know. This place has
the right qualities to bring in all the good luck it
needs! Okay, let's use feng shui to revive this inn!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, we're giving this all we've got! Roll up
your sleeves and put on your work gloves!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Let's sweep out all the dust and bad qi. ♪ We can
swish-swish it all away! ♪

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Oooh! You can see the color of the floor again!
Hi there! How are you? How does it feel to
breathe again?
choice_data_list:
(It looks like she's enjoying her chat with the
floor...)

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Sooo, if we look at the floor layout first... Okay,
let's move this dresser! Oh, and that dressing
table! And then...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Of course there is! We have to be thorough if
we're going to get the good qi flowing! ☆ So go,
go, goooo!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Once we're done with this, let's go shopping! We
have to get some new decorations!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Hm... The floor creaks when you walk on it... We
might need a hammer and some nails too.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: ...Hey, Dad. Can you call a carpenter for me?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! If we're going to do this, we might as well
do it right! And you can just hear the hallway
crying out in pain!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We make steady progress using both feng shui
and physical strength...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Phew. So, how's it look? It's a big improvement,
right?

text_block_list.name: Old Man
text_block_list.text: Wow... It's like a brand-new inn!

text_block_list.name: Old Lady
text_block_list.text:
Yes, and the atmosphere's wonderful! It's like the
place has been completely reborn!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
We just did a little cleaning is all! I also arranged
everything in line with feng shui, so things should
start getting real happy around here!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
The building's happy! ☆ You're both lucky! ☆
Don't you think that's wonderful?

text_block_list.name: Old Man
text_block_list.text:
...Hmm. Yeah. You're right! You've done so much
to restore this inn—there's no way I'm going to let
it close down on my watch!

text_block_list.name: Old Man
text_block_list.text:
Thank you. This precious inn has been in the
family for generations, and I'm going to do my
best to revitalize it!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: You're very welcome!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: My goal is to make everyone happy with feng shui! If you give me a shot to do that, I'll do the best I can!
choice_data_list: You're a real feng shui pro.
That was really... worth the effort...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Well, I've been watching my dad for years!
I'm glad I got to put everything I learned from him
to use!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Still... a professional, though?! Hehe. That has a
nice ring to it! Hehehe!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She might have been a little intense, but it looks
like her encouraging personality has made people
happy. I hope she can keep showcasing the full
extent of her skills.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Oh, did all that tire you out? I'm sorry!
choice_data_list: It's a good kind of tired.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Well, that's a relief! I feel the same!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
The tiredness you feel after helping people is the
best!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She might have been a little intense, but it looks
like her encouraging personality has made people
happy. I hope she can keep showcasing the full
extent of her skills.
